sample_reviews.author: James Whitfield
sample_reviews.text: Absolutely brilliant service. New boiler installed quickly and cleanly, and the engineer explained everything clearly. Highly recommend High Efficiency Gas.

sample_reviews.author: Sandra Booth
sample_reviews.text: Called out for an emergency with no heating in winter. They arrived within a couple of hours and had us back up and running the same day. Fantastic.

sample_reviews.author: Mark Thornton
sample_reviews.text: Very professional, honest pricing and no hidden extras. Gas safety certificate done promptly. Will definitely be using them again for our annual service.

brand.usp: Sheffield's trusted Gas Safe specialists delivering high-efficiency heating solutions with honest pricing and a fast, reliable response every time.
brand.about_paragraph: We are High Efficiency Gas Plumbing & Heating, a Sheffield-based team dedicated to keeping your home warm, safe and running efficiently. From new boiler installations to emergency call-outs, we bring Gas Safe expertise and a no-fuss approach to every job. We're proud to serve homeowners and landlords across Sheffield and the surrounding South Yorkshire area.
